issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which requires duration 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. These have different game mechanics: 'DuringYourTurn' means the effect lasts until your turn ends, while 'EndOfTurn' applies at end-of-turn timing.
Target should specify 'max:1' or use 'ChooseUpToOneOpponentCharacter' to match 'up to 1' language in card text.
